tier_notes: Tier 3 data: No specific physics parameters documented in available sources. Game consists of five distinct minigames (halfpipe, sled racing, aerial skiing, downhill skiing, snowball fights) with potentially different physics for each mode. Build dates found in ROM (US: M0.1901003 at 0x4000, EU: M0.0910522) but no movement/physics constants extracted.
sources_used: The Cutting Room Floor - Ski or Die (NES)
